product_information.product_name: Umberto Giannini Curl Jelly Care De-Frizz Conditioner 250 ML
product_information.description:
Umberto Giannini Curl Jelly Care De-Frizz Conditioner 250 ml is een hydraterende conditioner voor alle soorten golven, krullen en coils die glad maakt, ontwart, ontkroest en glans vasthoudt. Voegt vocht toe, bouwt veerkracht op, ontklit en conditioneert. De vorm van elke krul wordt verbeterd en geeft extra glans. Veilig voor gekleurd, chemisch behandeld, ontspannen haar en hairextensions. Perfect voor golvende, krullende en kroezige haartexturen.
Optimaal gebruik
Step 1:
Massage
Curl Jelly Wash 250ml
thoroughly through wet hair, cleansing your hair and scalp to remove product build-up.
Step 2:
Smooth
Curl Jelly Care 250ml
through damp hair to de-tangle and nourish.
Step 3:
Use
Curl Jelly Shine 180ml
as step 1 in your styling routine. Smooth through towel dried hair and follow up with your other UG styling products, diffuse or air dry as usual.
Step 4:
Apply
Curl Scrunching Jelly 200m
l through mid-lengths and ends scrunching upwards to create bouncy defined curls. Scrunch dry with a diffuser or leave to air dry.
Step 5:
Smooth enough
No More Frizz 75ml
serum through your mid lengths and ends to evenly coat them in a silky smooth veil of shine and nourishment. Less if you’re mildly frizzy or just need some split ends hiding, more for thick, unruly hair.
Refresh:
Need a refresh between washes? Spray
Curl Jelly Refresh 150ml
evenly over dry hair. Scrunch through curls and style as usual.
